chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-944 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 4465/2024 2. For hearing of main case 12-03-2025 Mr. Pervez Iqbal Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Saleh Muhammad Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Naved Ilahi Collector Customs West Jahanzaib Abbasi, Additional Collector West Statement filed on behalf of the Respondent Nos. 2 and 3 is taken on record. It is expressly stated that the demand notices / recovery notices available at page Nos. 49 and 65 of the petition are being withdrawn. In view of the statement learned counsel for the Respondent states that the petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
